nodes.context: Leading faction of the Juárez Cartel, originally an enforcer unit of former and active-duty policemen, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, murder.
Mexican drug cartel controlling drug corridors in Ciudad Juárez.
Prison gang and drug trafficking organization allied with La Línea.
